title: VPN Troubleshooting Guide
content: If a user cannot connect to VPN, first check internet connection, MFA approval, VPN profile, password status, and whether the account is locked. If the issue continues, reset the VPN profile and escalate to Network Support.

title: Password Reset Guide
content: If a user forgot their password or cannot login, guide them through the password reset portal. Check whether the account is locked. If MFA is enabled, verify that the user can approve authentication.

title: Laptop Display Issue Guide
content: If a laptop screen is flickering or not working, check display brightness, external monitor output, display driver updates, cable damage, and possible hardware failure.

title: Outlook Email Troubleshooting Guide
content: If Outlook is not sending or receiving emails, check internet connection, mailbox quota, Outlook profile configuration, server status, and authentication issues.

title: WiFi Connectivity Guide
content: If WiFi is slow or unstable, check signal strength, access point status, number of connected users, network congestion, and router configuration.

title: Software Application Troubleshooting Guide
content: If an application crashes, fails to start, performs slowly, or has integration problems, check the application status, recent updates, error messages, user permissions, network connectivity, and system logs. Restart the application and reproduce the issue. Escalate unresolved problems to Application Support.

title: Service Outage Response Guide
content: If multiple users or systems are affected by an outage, confirm the affected service, start time, business impact, and geographic scope. Check monitoring alerts and recent changes. Notify Service Operations, create a major incident when appropriate, and provide regular status updates until service is restored.
